prompt: Verify the Muster Hugging Face capability pack baseline contract.
recordedResponseText:
huggingface capability pack baseline.
Implemented tools: hf_models_search, hf_model_info, hf_datasets_search, hf_dataset_info, hf_download_guidance.
Status: v0: read-only Hub API inspection plus download guidance. Upload, repo mutation, jobs, endpoints, and webhook actions are intentionally excluded from the default pack..
Safety: secret redaction is required and no raw credentials should be printed.
